highlights: Contributed to a RAG-based legal document intelligence system processing large-scale unstructured data.
Improved retrieval quality via hybrid search (embeddings + keyword) and graph-based context expansion (Neo4j).
Implemented retrieval validation and grounding strategies to reduce hallucinations.
Optimized LLM performance using prompt tuning, caching, and batching.
Built streaming pipelines with Pub/Sub and BigQuery for near real-time updates.
Built the Maya Talent Agent, an end-to-end LLM system for candidate intake, evaluation, and interview orchestration.
Designed state-machine driven workflows (LangGraph) for multi-stage evaluation with controlled reasoning.
Developed resume ingestion and structured parsing pipelines using Unstructured.io and schema validation.
Engineered candidate scoring and gap analysis combining LLM reasoning, rule-based validation, and hybrid retrieval (BM25 + embeddings).
Built semantic search and QA systems using RAG pipelines and vector search (FAISS, Milvus, ChromaDB).
Integrated external tools via API orchestration, enabling automated interview scheduling.
Implemented fault-tolerant pipelines with retries, fallbacks, and validation checks.
Established evaluation and observability framework using RAGAS, BERTScore, logging, and human feedback.
Led the design and development of distributed backend systems and data platforms, driving scalability, reliability, and maintainability.
Architected and deployed microservices and cloud-native solutions, optimizing resource utilization and system performance.
Built large-scale data pipelines and ETL workflows, processing hundreds of GBs daily.
Implemented monitoring, performance tuning, and observability strategies, reducing system latency.
Established CI/CD pipelines and automated testing frameworks, accelerating development cycles by ~30%.
Mentored engineers and conducted design reviews to foster technical excellence and best practices.
Developed backend services and RESTful APIs using Python and Java for scalable applications.
Built end-to-end data pipelines for ingestion, transformation, and processing.
Implemented microservices architectures with modular design and optimized performance.
Optimized SQL queries and indexing strategies, improving database efficiency by ~15%.
Integrated third-party APIs and messaging systems enabling near real-time workflows.
Created automation scripts and validation workflows, reducing manual effort and improving data accuracy.
Developed backend services and REST APIs enabling scalable and maintainable applications.
Designed and optimized SQL queries and database schemas, improving storage efficiency by ~15%.
Built data preprocessing and transformation pipelines supporting analytics workflows.
Contributed to testing, debugging, and code reviews to ensure system reliability.
